response.overview: A few years ago, Adam and Hawa were a young couple in love. It was naturally assumed that they would get married and live happily ever after just like their namesakes. Today, they are no longer together. Instead, Hawa is housemate to Ayu and their relationship is complicated to say the least. Things take a turn for the worse when Ayu meets Adam and romance blossoms. Is their union a match made in heaven as everyone seems to think it is? Not if Hawa has anything to say about it.
response.title: Hawa
